cloud_storage.name: Dropbox
cloud_storage.notes: Large file uploads — watch for bulk data exfiltration

cloud_storage.name: Google Drive
cloud_storage.notes: Common legitimate use — flag only on very high volume

cloud_storage.name: OneDrive Personal
cloud_storage.notes: Personal OneDrive — different from corporate SharePoint

cloud_storage.name: WeTransfer
cloud_storage.notes: Anonymous file transfer — high risk, rarely used for legitimate work

cloud_storage.name: MEGA
cloud_storage.notes: Encrypted anonymous storage — very high risk weight

cloud_storage.name: MediaFire
cloud_storage.notes: Public file hosting — rarely legitimate in business context

cloud_storage.name: FileBin
cloud_storage.notes: Temporary public file hosting — very high risk

cloud_storage.name: Transfer.sh
cloud_storage.notes: Command-line file transfer — almost never legitimate in SMB

personal_email.name: Gmail
personal_email.notes: Common — flag only on high attachment volume during work hours

personal_email.name: Gmail SMTP
personal_email.notes: Outbound email sending — watch for bulk sends

personal_email.name: Outlook Personal
personal_email.notes: Personal Outlook — distinct from corporate Exchange

personal_email.name: Yahoo Mail
personal_email.notes: Personal email — unusual in professional context

personal_email.name: ProtonMail
personal_email.notes: Encrypted anonymous email — elevated risk in corporate setting

personal_email.name: Tutanota
personal_email.notes: Encrypted email — very unusual in SMB context

data_transfer.name: Pastebin
data_transfer.notes: Public text dump — common exfiltration vector for code and credentials

data_transfer.name: GitHub Gist
data_transfer.notes: Public code snippets — watch for credential dumps

messaging.name: Telegram
messaging.notes: Encrypted messaging — file sharing capability is a concern

messaging.name: Signal
messaging.notes: Encrypted messaging — less common exfiltration vector

messaging.name: Discord
messaging.notes: File sharing + messaging — unusual in professional context

messaging.name: WhatsApp
messaging.notes: Common messaging — flag only on high file transfer volume

data_brokers.name: Spokeo
data_brokers.notes: Data broker — client data research concern

suspicious_tools.name: ngrok
suspicious_tools.notes: Tunnel tool — can expose internal systems to internet. Almost never legitimate in SMB.

suspicious_tools.name: RequestBin
suspicious_tools.notes: HTTP request inspector — can capture data being sent

suspicious_tools.name: Webhook.site
suspicious_tools.notes: Live webhook inspector — high exfiltration risk

notes.risk_weight: Multiplies against base thresholds. 1.0 = standard. 2.0 = half the normal threshold triggers a warning.
notes.excluded_domains: These domains are never flagged regardless of volume — standard business infrastructure.
notes.philosophy: Flag unusual behavior, not normal work. A lawyer using Gmail occasionally is fine. A lawyer uploading 50MB to WeTransfer at 11pm is not.
